name: Webinar Builder
description: Thiet ke webinar ban hang A-Z: kich ban, slide, CTA, email follow-up

fields.label: Chu de Webinar
fields.placeholder: Vi du: 5 bi quyet tang doanh thu 3x trong 90 ngay

fields.label: San pham / Offer cuoi webinar
fields.placeholder: Vi du: Khoa hoc X, Phan mem Y, Dich vu Z...

fields.label: Doi tuong tham du
fields.placeholder: Vi du: Chu doanh nghiep SME, Sales Manager...

prompt_template:
Thiet ke Webinar ban hang hoan chinh bang tieng Viet.

THONG TIN WEBINAR:
Chu de: {{webinar_topic}}
San pham ban: {{product}}
Doi tuong: {{target_audience}}
Thoi luong: {{duration}}
Gia san pham: {{price}}

Workspace: {{workspace_name}} | Nguoi tao: {{user_name}}

YEU CAU NOI DUNG:
1. Kich ban chi tiet tung phan:
   - Hook mo dau (5 phut): cau hoi, thong ke, cam ket
   - Story / Problem (10 phut): noi dau khach hang
   - Content chinh (40-60 phut): 3-5 chia se gia tri thuc te
   - Pitch san pham (15-20 phut): gia tri, chung minh, bao dam
   - Q&A va chot (10 phut)
2. Outline 12-15 slide (tieu de + bullet points chinh moi slide)
3. 3 CTA scripts khac nhau (urgent, value-based, social proof)
4. Email xac nhan dang ky (subject + noi dung day du)
5. Email nhac nho 1 ngay truoc (subject + noi dung)
6. Email follow-up sau webinar voi replay link (subject + noi dung)

Tao webinar kit day du, chuyen nghiep, toi uu conversion:
